memory.summary: A friend invited me to lunch, which conflicts with my plan to finish the assignment analysis first.
I made progress on the assignment, but my friend has now gathered everyone to order lunch immediately.
I spent 1.5 hours on the assignment analysis, reaching 69% progress, though I still have a sleep debt of 2 hours.
The assignment deadline passed at 18:00 while I was only at 78% progress, meaning I missed the submission window.
Despite missing the 18:00 deadline, I managed to push my analysis progress from 78% to 84% in the last hour. My low energy and sleep debt remain significant constraints moving forward.
I pushed the assignment to 86% but missed the reading deadline entirely, leaving me with unfinished work and high stress despite my limited energy.
I made modest progress on the assignment analysis, but I still missed the deadline and face high stress with significant sleep debt.
I continued working on the assignment analysis, moving progress from 92% to 93%, though my energy remains critically low at 0.3 and stress is high.
I made minimal progress on the assignment analysis, yet my energy is critically low and stress remains high despite the small gain.
Despite working late, I only gained 1% progress while my energy is effectively zero and stress remains critically high.
After working until 23:15, my energy is now completely depleted at 0.0 with a 2-hour sleep debt, yet stress remains critically high despite the minimal progress.
Working until 23:45 yielded negligible progress while my energy remains at zero and stress is critically high.
